steps.t: Aras can be found just north of the Haradrim camp, Lang Boha. You should speak with Aras.
Lang Boha can be found on the eastern shores of Dor-en-Ernil. Enter Lang Boha and hinder the Corsair forces.
The Captain of the Haradrim camp can be found in Lang Boha. Find and confront the Haradrim Captain.
Aras can be found just north of the Haradrim camp, Lang Boha. You should speak with Aras.
